title: henslowia paniculata
intro: Henslowia paniculata, also known as Bastard Toadflax, is a flowering plant species native to Australia and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, providing health benefits such as antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory activities. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of Henslowia paniculata have been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
